title: Apex Drop
description: A premium skydiving booking platform with transparent pricing, trust-first design, and a multi-step booking wizard. Features include experience tiers, safety prerequisites, and anxiety FAQs.

title: Blue Horizon
description: A conservation-first scuba diving booking platform with marine life heatmaps, crowd forecasting, underwater topography maps, and a real-time cost calculator with itemized gear rental.

title: Ghost of the Mountains
description: An interactive conservation storytelling website following a snow leopard named Khangri. Features branching narrative choices, educational mini-games, habitat loss calculators, and donation integration.

title: Solarpunk Architecture
description: A visually rich portfolio for a sustainable architecture firm. Features project galleries, an interactive philosophy section, and a nature-integrated design system with smooth page transitions.

title: F1 Academy
description: A premium motorsport learning platform with glassmorphism UI, performance tracking dashboards, and advanced lighting effects. Designed to educate beginners on Formula 1 fundamentals.
